meta.title: Board Advisory for AI, Digital Risk & Transformation | Patrick L. Judge

meta.name: description
meta.content: Board and executive advisory for AI oversight, digital transformation risk, governance, compliance, strategic execution, enterprise modernization, and value realization.
Board Advisory for AI, Digital Risk & Transformation | Patrick L. Judge
Board and executive advisory for AI oversight, digital transformation risk, governance, compliance, strategic execution, enterprise modernization, and value realization.

link.script: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@graph":[{"@type":"Person","@id":"https://patrickljudge.com/#person","name":"Patrick L. Judge","jobTitle":"Chief AI Strategy & Digital Transformation Executive","url":"https://patrickljudge.com/","email":"mailto:pjudge@pljca.com","telephone":"+14044217252","address":{"@type":"PostalAddress","addressLocality":"Atlanta","addressRegion":"GA","addressCountry":"US"},"sameAs":["https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrickljudge"],"knowsAbout":["AI Strategy","AI Governance","Responsible AI","Digital Transformation","Enterprise Transformation","PMO Modernization","EPMO","Portfolio Governance","Operating Model Design","Risk Management","Compliance","Board Advisory","Fractional Executive Leadership","Healthcare","Aviation","Financial Services","Manufacturing","SaaS"]},{"@type":"Organization","@id":"https://patrickljudge.com/#organization","name":"PLJ Consulting, Advisory & Fractional Executive Leadership","url":"https://patrickljudge.com/","founder":{"@id":"https://patrickljudge.com/#person"}},{"@type":"WebSite","@id":"https://patrickljudge.com/#website","url":"https://patrickljudge.com/","name":"Patrick L. Judge | AI Strategy & Digital Transformation Advisory","publisher":{"@id":"https://patrickljudge.com/#person"}}]}

section.h1: Board Advisory for AI, Digital Risk & Transformation
section.p: Board and executive advisory for AI oversight, digital transformation risk, governance, compliance, strategic execution, enterprise modernization, and value realization.

div.p: Board and executive advisory for AI oversight, digital transformation risk, governance, compliance, strategic execution, enterprise modernization, and value realization.

ul.li: Advise boards and executive teams on AI oversight, digital risk, responsible AI, compliance readiness, and transformation governance.
Translate complex AI and digital issues into board-ready decisions, risk themes, investment priorities, and operating implications.
Support executive alignment around strategy, governance, execution, and measurable business value.

aside.p: Chief AI Officer, Chief Digital Officer, fractional CDO, fractional CAIO, AI strategy advisor, digital transformation executive, PMO modernization, enterprise transformation, risk management, compliance, board advisory.

div.p: Organizations do not need more disconnected initiatives. They need executive-level clarity, governance, operating discipline, and a practical path from strategy to measurable execution. Patrick brings the cross-functional leadership required to connect ambition, investment, risk, adoption, and value.

div.br:
Chief AI Strategy & Digital Transformation Executive | Atlanta, GA
pjudge@pljca.com | +1 (404) 421-7252 | LinkedIn
Executive advisory on AI strategy, AI governance, responsible AI, digital transformation, PMO/EPMO modernization, operating model design, risk, compliance, and fractional executive leadership.
